entry.title: New: Bill 142 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 14 OF THE HAWAI‘I COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), BY ADDING A NEW ARTICLE RELATING TO THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN ADOPT-A-COUNTY-STREET PROGRAM Establishes an Adopt-A-County-Street program in partnership with the Dep

Latest action: Council: Bill 142 passes second & final reading - 04/22/26

View on the council site
